highlights: Five peaks with easy hiking trails and stairs offering panoramic city and mountain views
Free admission, walkable from city center, accessible without tours or guides required
Adjacent caves within 10-minute walk; food stalls and facilities nearby on approach street

thingsToKnow.crowds: Can attract bus tour groups; visit early morning for solitude
thingsToKnow.difficulty: Easy to moderate climbs; some peaks have stairs, others have marked trails
thingsToKnow.safety: Avoid venturing deep into bushes; needles observed in vegetation
thingsToKnow.accessibility: Multiple entry points; walkable from accommodation in about 15 minutes
thingsToKnow.seasonal: Best visited in clear, sunny weather; paths become slippery when raining

visitorTips: Arrive early morning before tour buses to enjoy the site with fewer crowds
Bring sturdy footwear; wet conditions make trails slippery, especially after rain
Allocate 2-3 hours to explore all five peaks and nearby caves thoroughly

faq.question: How long does it take to hike all the peaks?
faq.answer: Most visitors spend 2-3 hours exploring all five peaks and nearby caves at a leisurely pace

faq.question: Do I need a guide or tour to visit?
faq.answer: No, you can explore independently. No guides are required and visitors are not bothered by vendors

faq.question: What are weather conditions like for visiting?
faq.answer: Sunny days provide best visibility of surrounding mountains. Trails become slippery when raining, so avoid wet conditions

sentiment.positive: Travelers appreciate the easy accessibility, panoramic views, free entry, and peaceful atmosphere ideal for independent exploration
sentiment.negative: Limited historical relics remain; fortress structure is small and not particularly impressive
